choose.when: INSERT INTO pa_mst_property (company_id, code, name, description, parent_id, sort_order, attributes, property_type, active_status, active_from, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{record.companyId}, #{record.code}, #{record.name}, #{record.description}, #{record.parentId}, #{record.sortOrder}, #{record.attributes}, 'GENERAL', #{record.activeStatus}, #{record.activeFrom}, #{record.createdBy}, #{record.updatedBy})

INSERT INTO pa_mst_unit (company_id, property_id, property_name, unit_code, unit_type, code, name, description, parent_id, sort_order, attributes, active_status, active_from, status, created_by, updated_by) SELECT #{record.companyId}, p.id, p.name, #{record.code}, #{record.name}, #{record.code}, #{record.name}, #{record.description}, #{record.parentId}, #{record.sortOrder}, #{record.attributes}, #{record.activeStatus}, #{record.activeFrom}, 'VACANT', #{record.createdBy}, #{record.updatedBy} FROM pa_mst_floor f JOIN pa_mst_block b ON b.id = f.parent_id JOIN pa_mst_property p ON p.id = b.parent_id WHERE f.id = #{record.parentId}
choose.otherwise: INSERT INTO ${tableName} (company_id, code, name, description, parent_id, sort_order, attributes, active_status, active_from, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{record.companyId}, #{record.code}, #{record.name}, #{record.description}, #{record.parentId}, #{record.sortOrder}, #{record.attributes}, #{record.activeStatus}, #{record.activeFrom}, #{record.createdBy}, #{record.updatedBy})

mapper.update:
UPDATE ${tableName} SET code = #{record.code}, name = #{record.name}, description = #{record.description}, parent_id = #{record.parentId}, sort_order = #{record.sortOrder}, attributes = #{record.attributes}, active_status = #{record.activeStatus},
unit_code = #{record.code}, unit_type = #{record.name},
updated_by = #{record.updatedBy}, updated_on = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{record.id} AND active_status = 'Y'
UPDATE ${tableName} SET active_status = 'N', active_to = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_on = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND active_status = 'Y'
